nasb.text: For how can such a servant of my lord talk with such as my lord? As for me, there remains just now no strength in me, nor has any breath been left in me.”

esv.text: How can my lord’s servant talk with my lord? For now no strength remains in me, and no breath is left in me.”

cnv.text: 我主的僕人怎能和我主說話呢？我現在全身無力，沒有氣息。”

ccb.text: 仆人我怎能跟我主说话？我现在浑身无力，没有气息。”
